story: Jonathan keeps calling his father Bill; voicemail every time. He asks Uncle Jack to check the house—locked, car gone; hospitals show nothing. He is desperate. He leaves rambling voicemails that cut off; he rages, then apologizes. Bill is on a carefree trip in Aruba with a new friend, Charlotte, not taking his phone that day.
implausible_knowledge: Bill is on a carefree trip in Aruba with a new friend, Charlotte, not taking his phone that day.
question: What will Jonathan most plausibly do next to try to find his father?
answer_with_knowledge: Wait for Bill to call back from Aruba.
